subject: Re: Re: FW: VPN not connecting — GP-ERR-4021 since Friday
description:
Hi IT Support,

I've been having serious VPN connectivity issues for the past three days. Every time I try to connect to GlobalProtect from my home office, the tunnel establishes for about 90 seconds and then drops with error code GP-ERR-4021. I'm on a Windows 11 laptop (Dell Latitude 5540), connecting over Comcast residential broadband. The issue started after last Friday's endpoint agent update pushed by Intune. I need this resolved ASAP because I cannot access any internal resources — Jira, Confluence, the internal Git server, or the finance SharePoint.

I already tried:
  1. Rebooting the laptop
  2. Flushing DNS (ipconfig /flushdns)
  3. Releasing and renewing DHCP
  4. Disabling Windows Firewall temporarily
  5. Uninstalling and reinstalling GlobalProtect 6.1.2

None of these helped.

Thanks,
Priya Nair
Senior Analyst, Risk Management

subject: Monitor flickering — screenshot attached inline
description:
Hi,

My external monitor (Dell U2722D) has been flickering non-stop since this morning. It started after I docked my laptop (ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11) into the Lenovo USB-C dock. The built-in laptop screen is fine — only the external monitor flickers.

I took a photo with my phone and pasted it here:

data:image/png;base64,

(Sorry, I wasn't sure how to attach it properly.)

The flickering gets worse when I open Excel or any app with a lot of white background. I tried a different DisplayPort cable but same result. Could this be a driver issue? We had a Windows Update last week.

Thanks,
David Park
Quantitative Research

subject: Outlook keeps crashing after update
description:
Hi IT Team,

Outlook has been crashing repeatedly since the update that was pushed on Tuesday morning. Every time I try to open a calendar invite from the Legal team, Outlook freezes for about 10 seconds and then closes with this error:

APPCRASH — mso40uiwin32client.dll
Exception code: 0xc0000005
Offset: 0x00000000001A3F7C

I've already tried running Office Repair (Quick Repair) but it didn't help. I haven't tried Online Repair yet because I wasn't sure if that would reset my settings.

I can still use Outlook Web App without issues, so it's definitely the desktop client.


Thanks,

Jennifer Liu
Associate General Counsel
Legal & Compliance
Contoso Financial Services

subject: WiFi is DEAD on 4th floor 🔥🔥🔥 HELP
description:

Things we tried:
• Restarting laptops 💻❌

The SSID 'Contoso-Corp' shows up but just spins when we try to connect 🔄🔄🔄

PLEASE HELP ASAP 🙏🙏🙏🔥💀

— Alex Rivera
VP, Structured Products
☎️ x4472

subject: FW: URGENT: Your Contoso Financial Services Account Has Been Compromised — Immediate Action Required — Click Here to Verify Your Identity — Reference Number CF-2026-03-13-88421 — This is an automated security notification from the Contoso Financial Services Security Team — Please do not reply to this email — If you did not initiate this request please contact security immediately — Your account will be locked in 24 hours if no action is taken — Contoso Financial Services Fraud Prevention Unit — Case ID FPU-7729134 — Priority Escalation
description:
Hi Security Team,

I received the phishing email forwarded in the subject line above. It was sent to my work address (tom.walsh@contoso.com) at 6:42 AM this morning from 'security-alerts@cont0so-financial.com' (note the zero instead of 'o'). The email contained a link to a fake login page at hxxps://contoso-verify[.]xyz/login.

I did NOT click the link or enter any credentials. I'm reporting it as per the security awareness training we had last month.

The original email headers are saved in my Quarantine folder if you need them.

Thanks,
Tom Walsh
Client Services

subject: Production database query performance degraded — urgent
description:
Hi DBA Team,




The production reporting database    (sql-prod-rpt-02)    has been extremely slow since     last night.





			Queries that normally take 2-3 seconds are now taking		 45+ seconds.




         The nightly ETL job that populates the risk dashboards failed at 02:15 AM with a timeout after 3600 seconds.          This means the morning risk reports for 30 portfolio managers     are showing     yesterday's data.






		Affected:
			- sql-prod-rpt-02 instance
			- RiskDashboard database
			- Nightly ETL pipeline (ADF_RiskLoad_Prod)




          I checked the Activity Monitor and see massive wait stats on PAGEIOLATCH_SH,     suggesting    disk I/O    bottleneck.







Thanks,


Yuki Sato

Database Administrator

subject: Quarterly compliance audit — access review for SharePoint and Azure resources
description:
Hi IT Governance Team,

As part of the Q1 2026 compliance audit, I need to review and confirm access permissions across several SharePoint sites and Azure resources. Please provide access review reports for the following:

SharePoint Sites:
  1. https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/compliance-policies
  2. https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/legal-hold-documents
  3. https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/audit-evidence-2026-q1
  4. https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/risk-management-docs
  5. https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/hr-confidential

Azure Resources:
  6. https://portal.azure.com/#@contoso.com/resource/subscriptions/a1b2c3d4/resourceGroups/rg-compliance-prod
  7. https://portal.azure.com/#@contoso.com/resource/subscriptions/a1b2c3d4/resourceGroups/rg-audit-storage
  8. https://portal.azure.com/#blade/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/Overview/appId/e5f6g7h8

Documentation:
  9. https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/it-governance/SitePages/Access-Review-Process.aspx
  10. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/active-directory/governance/access-reviews-overview
  11. https://contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/it-governance/Shared%20Documents/Q1-Audit-Checklist.xlsx

The audit committee meeting is on March 28, so I need these reports by March 25 at the latest. Each report should list all users with access, their permission level, and last access date.

Thanks,
Maria Santos
Chief Compliance Officer

subject: SAP GUI errors — multiple transaction codes failing since this morning
description:
Hi Enterprise Apps Team,

Multiple SAP transactions have been failing since 07:00 AM today. I've been tracking the errors — here's the data from my team's reports:

Tcode	Error Code	Timestamp	User	Count	Module
VA01	SQL_ERROR_502	07:02:15	RPATEL	12	SD
ME21N	UPDATE_FAILED	07:05:33	JMORGAN	8	MM
FB01	POSTING_ERROR	07:08:41	SKIM	15	FI
MM01	LOCK_TIMEOUT	07:12:09	RPATEL	6	MM
VA01	SQL_ERROR_502	07:15:22	LCHEN	11	SD
CO01	AUTH_CHECK_FAIL	07:18:55	ABROWN	3	CO
FB01	POSTING_ERROR	07:22:01	SKIM	18	FI
ME21N	UPDATE_FAILED	07:25:17	DWILSON	9	MM
VA01	SQL_ERROR_502	07:30:44	RPATEL	14	SD
XK01	DUPLICATE_KEY	07:33:28	JMORGAN	2	MM

The SQL_ERROR_502 on VA01 is the most frequent and is blocking our Sales team from creating orders. The POSTING_ERROR on FB01 is preventing Finance from posting journal entries.

Our SAP basis team said the database tablespace for SAPSR3 might be running low but they can't confirm without DBA access.

This is affecting approximately 40 users across Sales, Finance, and Procurement.

Thanks,
Raj Patel
SAP Functional Lead
Enterprise Systems

subject: MFA not working on new phone — unable to approve sign-in requests
description:
[Phone transcription — call received 2026-03-14 08:55 AM]

Hi, um, yeah, so I, uh, I got a new phone over the weekend — like, an iPhone 15 — and, um, I set it up and everything, you know, but now when I try to, uh, log in to anything at work, like, the Microsoft Authenticator app, um, it doesn't send me the, uh, the push notification anymore.

Like, you know, I used to get the little popup that says, like, 'Approve sign-in' and I'd just, uh, tap the number, you know? But now it just... [inaudible] ...nothing happens. I waited like five minutes and, um, nothing.

So I tried to, like, uh, re-register the app, you know, but when I go to aka.ms/mysecurityinfo it says I need to, um, approve on my old device first, which I, uh, I already wiped. Like, I traded it in at the Apple Store, so, um, I don't have it anymore.

[inaudible] ...yeah, so I'm basically, like, completely locked out of everything right now. I can't get into Outlook, Teams, SharePoint — you know, nothing that requires, uh, MFA. Which is, like, everything. [laughs]

Um, my manager is, uh, Diana Ross — not the singer, you know [laughs] — she's in, like, Portfolio Analytics. She can, um, verify who I am if you need that.

Oh, and my name is, uh, Chris Donovan. My email is chris.donovan@contoso.com.

[End of transcription]

subject: Network printer not working — 网络打印机无法打印
description:
Hi IT,

The network printer on Level 22 of the Singapore office (Printer: HP LaserJet MFP M635, IP: 10.65.22.40) is not working since this morning.

我今天早上发了三个打印任务，但打印机完全没有反应。打印队列显示任务状态是“错误”。其他同事也遇到了同样的问题。

I checked the printer physically — the display shows 'Ready' and there are no paper jams or error lights. 我也重启了打印机但没有用。

When I try to ping the printer from my laptop, I get:
  Reply from 10.65.22.40: bytes=32 time=1ms TTL=64

So network connectivity seems fine. 但从打印机的Web界面 (http://10.65.22.40) 我看到一个错误信息说 'Print spooler service unavailable'.

这台打印机是我们整个22楼唯一的打印机，大约30个人依赖它。我们今天下午有个重要的客户会议需要打印材料。

Please help!

谢谢,
Wei Lin
Investment Banking, Singapore

subject: New hire onboarding — accounts and equipment for Daniel Osei starting March 24
description:
Hi IT Onboarding Team,

We have a new hire joining the Fixed Income Analytics team on Monday, March 24. Please set up the following:

Name: Daniel Osei
Title: Quantitative Analyst
Department: Fixed Income Analytics
Manager: Sarah Goldstein
Start Date: March 24, 2026
Office: New York, Building 3, Floor 7

Required access and equipment:
  1. Active Directory account and email (daniel.osei@contoso.com)
  2. Microsoft 365 E5 license
  3. Bloomberg Terminal access (B-PIPE feed)
  4. Access to Fixed Income SharePoint site and Teams channels
  5. VPN/GlobalProtect setup for remote work
  6. Standard laptop (Dell Latitude 5550) with docking station and dual monitors
  7. Physical badge for Building 3
  8. Access to the Quant Analytics shared drive (\\fs-quant-01\analytics)

Please have everything ready by end of day Friday, March 21, so we can verify before his first day.

Thanks,
Sarah Goldstein
Head of Fixed Income Analytics

---

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office from March 10-14 with limited access to email. I will respond to your message when I return on Monday, March 17.

For urgent matters, please contact my deputy James Wright at james.wright@contoso.com or call +1 (212) 555-0177.

For IT emergencies, please contact the IT Service Desk at x5000 or itsupport@contoso.com.

Best regards,
Sarah Goldstein
Head of Fixed Income Analytics
Contoso Financial Services
